summary: AWS Communications (WorkMail + Pinpoint) Phase C integration testing complete. Backend APIs 8/11 passed (73%). Frontend UI all elements verified and working after fixing token access issue. Pinpoint segments/campaigns APIs fail due to AWS deprecation.

minor.issue: Returns 500 - AWS has deprecated Pinpoint engagement features (segments/campaigns). Error: ForbiddenException - AWS ends support Oct 30, 2026
Returns 500 - AWS has deprecated segment creation
Returns 500 - AWS has deprecated campaign listing

action_items: Consider removing or disabling Pinpoint segments/campaigns UI features since AWS has deprecated these APIs
Add a note in the UI that Pinpoint engagement features (segments, campaigns) are deprecated by AWS
Consider migrating to Amazon Connect for engagement capabilities as recommended by AWS
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: AWSWorkMailPinpointPage.jsx was using 'const { token } = useAuth()' but AuthContext doesn't expose 'token'. Changed to localStorage.getItem('token')

success_rate.backend: 73% (8/11 tests passed - 3 failures due to AWS deprecation)

seed_data_creation: Test Pinpoint apps created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AWS Communications Phase C is implemented. WorkMail and Pinpoint core features work. Both services connect to real AWS in us-east-1. However, Pinpoint 'engagement features' (segments, campaigns, journeys) are deprecated by AWS as of Oct 30, 2026 and return ForbiddenException. Frontend accessible at /aws-comms via Tools dropdown > Communications.

features_tested.GET /api/aws-comms/status: PASSED - Returns available:true for both WorkMail and Pinpoint
features_tested.GET /api/aws-comms/pinpoint/applications: PASSED - Returns applications list with existing 'BigMann Marketing' app
features_tested.Authentication required endpoints: PASSED - All endpoints correctly return 401/403 without auth
features_tested.Frontend /aws-comms page: PASSED - Page loads with title 'AWS Communications' and status cards
features_tested.Frontend Pinpoint tab: PASSED - Shows applications list with create form and existing 'BigMann Marketing' app
features_tested.Frontend navigation: PASSED - 'Communications' link in Tools dropdown navigates to /aws-comms

aws_deprecation_note: AWS will end support for Amazon Pinpoint engagement features (segments, message templates, campaigns, journeys, analytics) on October 30, 2026. AWS recommends migrating to Amazon Connect for engagement capabilities.
